name: Crystal Abundance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>氾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>濫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 4 "Crystal Beast" cards from your Spell & Trap Zone to the GY; send as many cards on the field as possible to the GY, then Special Summon as many "Crystal Beast" monsters as possible from your GY, up to the number of cards sent from your opponent's field to the GY by this card's effect.
eff: Send 4 "Crystal Beast" cards from your Spell & Trap Zone to the GY; send as many cards on the field as possible to the GY, then Special Summon as many "Crystal Beast" monsters as possible from your GY, up to the number of cards sent from your opponent's field to the GY by this card's effect.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack
Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
